channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19645] Directory Migration: Migration fails to update LVM attribute
item.description:
LFSCK read-only reports these errors after migration:

00100000:10000000:26.0F:1764155361.227119:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:1117:lfsck_namespace_update_lmv()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK updated the slave LMV EA for the object [0x2404f5b49:0x6d4:0x0]: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227122:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:2243:lfsck_namespace_striped_dir_rescan()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK repair the shard 0 [0x2404f5b49:0x6d4:0x0] of the striped directory [0x2404f5b4a:0x4ea:0x0
] with dangling no/no, rename no/no, llinkea no/no, repair_lmvea yes/yes: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227129:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:1117:lfsck_namespace_update_lmv()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK updated the slave LMV EA for the object [0x2404f5b49:0x6d5:0x0]: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227135:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:2243:lfsck_namespace_striped_dir_rescan()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK repair the shard 0 [0x2404f5b49:0x6d5:0x0] of the striped directory [0x2404f5b4a:0x4ed:0x0
] with dangling no/no, rename no/no, llinkea no/no, repair_lmvea yes/yes: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227148:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:1117:lfsck_namespace_update_lmv()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK updated the slave LMV EA for the object [0x2404f5b49:0x6d7:0x0]: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227150:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:2243:lfsck_namespace_striped_dir_rescan()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK repair the shard 0 [0x2404f5b49:0x6d7:0x0] of the striped directory [0x2404f5b4a:0x4ef:0x0
] with dangling no/no, rename no/no, llinkea no/no, repair_lmvea yes/yes: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227161:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:1117:lfsck_namespace_update_lmv()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK updated the slave LMV EA for the object [0x2404f5b49:0x6d8:0x0]: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227163:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:2243:lfsck_namespace_striped_dir_rescan()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK repair the shard 0 [0x2404f5b49:0x6d8:0x0] of the striped directory [0x2404f5b4a:0x4f1:0x0
] with dangling no/no, rename no/no, llinkea no/no, repair_lmvea yes/yes: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227175:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:1117:lfsck_namespace_update_lmv()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK updated the slave LMV EA for the object [0x2404f5b49:0x6da:0x0]: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227176:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:2243:lfsck_namespace_striped_dir_rescan()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK repair the shard 0 [0x2404f5b49:0x6da:0x0] of the striped directory [0x2404f5b4a:0x4f3:0x0
] with dangling no/no, rename no/no, llinkea no/no, repair_lmvea yes/yes: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227188:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:1117:lfsck_namespace_update_lmv()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK updated the slave LMV EA for the object [0x2404f5b49:0x6db:0x0]: rc = 0
00100000:10000000:26.0:1764155361.227190:0:469923:0:(lfsck_striped_dir.c:2243:lfsck_namespace_striped_dir_rescan()) kjcf05-MDT0001-osd: namespace LFSCK repair the shard 0 [0x2404f5b49:0x6db:0x0] of the striped directory [0x2404f5b4a:0x4f4:0x0
] with dangling no/no, rename no/no, llinkea no/no, repair_lmvea yes/yes: rc = 0
item.summary: Directory Migration: Migration fails to update LVM attribute

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62771/
Subject: LU-19645 lod: update slave lmv on dir shrink
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 76f9a5e17e1b6c6864d3fd651b6c09a9fedb2cc8

"Alexander Zarochentsev <alexander.zarochentsev@hpe.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62771
Subject: LU-19645 lod: update slave lmv on dir shrink
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 6cbe5cda0cdfec976bc67030ba5aed96ec0e7310

lmv_master_mdt_index in the slave LMV is not correct:
shard:

zam@darkstar:~$ echo 0AzUDAEAAAABAAAAAgAAAgEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA= | base64 -d | ~/lmv -d 
magic:      0xcd40cd0
stripe_count:   0x0001 (1)
master_mdt_index: 0x0001 (1)
hash_type:    0x2000002 fnv_1a_64,fixed
layout_version:  0x0001 (1)
migrate_offset:  0x0000 (0)
migrate_hash:   0x0000 none

and top dir:

zam@darkstar:~$ echo 0AzSDAEAAAABAAAAAgAAAgEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA= | base64 -d  | ~/lmv -d 
magic:            0xcd20cd0
stripe_count:     0x0001 (1)
master_mdt_index: 0x0001 (1)
hash_type:        0x2000002 fnv_1a_64,fixed
layout_version:   0x0001 (1)
migrate_offset:   0x0000 (0)
migrate_hash:     0x0000 none

for shard's lvm attribute, master_mdt_index field is used for storing shard's index.
looks like it is wrong: master_mdt_index: 0x0001 (1), should be 0.
